name: mister-fetch
description: Mister Fetch — a local-first search/task engine where every query is a single-shot, scope-locked, memory-ephemeral agent that fetches one answer and then bows out.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@mister-fetch/core && npm run build --workspace=@mister-fetch/cli
scripts.check: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@mister-fetch/core && npm run build --workspace=@mister-fetch/core && npm run typecheck --workspace=@mister-fetch/cli
